report.summary: v10 community cycle: Drafted 4 new tweets (Fed $100B wipeout, 422 pages milestone, DCA fear edition, CLARITY Act complication), Monday Discord/TG update, weekly newsletter v6 draft, and Fed Wipeout social card (1200x630 SVG with 3 data cards). All content deploy-safe with verified-live links only.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet: Fed Fallout Market Outlook — $100B wipeout, rates held at 3.5-3.75%, whale divergence, links to /tools/whale-tracker (LIVE) — schedule Mon AM
Tweet: 422 Pages Milestone — publish queue complete, 110+ tools / 174+ guides / 86 protocols / 8 languages, links to degen0x.com — schedule Mon PM
Tweet: DCA in the Dip Fed Edition — F&G 10 for 47 days, historical 200%+ returns, 1145% vs 202% DCA math, links to /tools/dca-calculator (LIVE) — schedule Mon/Tue
Tweet: CLARITY Act Complication — community bank deregulation attached, Senate hearing April, 18 digital commodities, links to /learn/defi-regulation-guide-2026 (LIVE) — schedule Tue
Discord/TG: Monday Update — $100B wipeout + 422 milestone + CLARITY Act + whale divergence + 4 live tool links
Newsletter v6: Full weekly digest draft — Fed fallout + 422 milestone + whale divergence + Flash Loans/Vaults (deploy-dependent links)
CARRIED FROM v9: 9 previous posts (DeFi education teaser, flash loans hook, vault strategies, midweek data, CLARITY threads, whale accumulation, DCA fear, engagement poll, Discord Tuesday)
